headline: HONEYWELL BOARD OF DIRECTORS SETS RECORD DATE AND ANNOUNCES EXPECTED TIMING FOR SPIN-OFF OF HONEYWELL AEROSPACE AND HONEYWELL REVERSE STOCK SPLIT
summary: Honeywell (NASDAQ: HON) today announced that its Board of Directors has set a record date of June 15, 2026 (the "Record Date") for the previously announced spin-off of Honeywell Aerospace.

headline: Honeywell Sets June 15, 2026 Record Date For Aerospace Spin-Off; Shareowners Expected To Receive 1 Share Of Honeywell Aerospace Common Stock For Every 2 Shares Of Honeywell Common Stock Owned; Honeywell Aerospace Expected To Begin Trading On June 29, 2026, Under The Ticker Symbol "HONA"; Honeywell Reverse Stock Split Expected To Occur On June 29, 2026
summary: Record date set for June 15, 2026Distribution expected to occur on June 29, 2026, with shareowners of record expected to receive one share of Honeywell Aerospace common stock for every two shares of Honeywell common

headline: RBC Capital Maintains Outperform on Honeywell Intl, Raises Price Target to $275
summary: RBC Capital  analyst Deane Dray   maintains Honeywell Intl (NASDAQ:HON) with a Outperform and raises the price target from $268 to $275.

headline: Quantinuum Stock Falls After Uninspiring Quantum IPO Debut. What Went Wrong?
summary: Quantinuum  stock popped in its trading debut, opening 13% above its initial public offering price in what seemed to be a major win for the quantum computing industry.  Regardless, the stock outperformed other notable names in the rest sector:  IonQ  closed down 3.8% while  D-Wave Quantum  and  Rigetti Computing  added 0.3% each.  The stock looked set to fall on its second day of trading, pointing 3.6% lower at $58.18 in premarket trading Friday.

headline: The Dow Hit a Record. The Chip Trade Hit a Wall. And Hezbollah Said No.
summary: The Dow set a record while Broadcom crashed 13% on a 200% AI growth guide. Hezbollah rejected the Lebanon ceasefire, CrowdStrike got sold on a beat, and SpaceX's $1.77 trillion IPO is one week out.
